rawIntent: [gestalt-maintenance/CONTEXT_ALIGNMENT] Reconcile docs/DOMAIN.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: entity 'roles' exists in the domain model but no module references it. Decide whether to introduce the module under src/modules/roles/ or to remove the entity from the domain model.

successCriteria.description: The 'roles' entity is either fully integrated with a new module under src/modules/roles/ or removed from the domain model.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Changes to other domains or modules not related to 'roles'
